title: Certified Tail Bounds for Prime-Power Threshold Cutoff Sequences: Verification Artifact
description: Verification artifact for the paper Certified Tail Bounds for Prime-Power Threshold Cutoff Sequences. The artifact contains the paper source and PDF, a frozen threshold certificate, a standalone deterministic C++17 exact-integer verifier, build instructions, and SHA256 hashes. The verifier recomputes the finite-prefix rows from the cutoff definition and checks the threshold-83 tail certificate without floating-point arithmetic or exploratory search code. This record uses split licensing: verifier source code is MIT-licensed; certificate, checksum, and metadata files are CC0-1.0 to the extent permitted by law; paper source and PDF are copyright Wesley Atwell and are not MIT-licensed. See LICENSE.md for file-level licensing.
